behaviors.normalMode: required products configure before add; products without required add directly
behaviors.quickMode: all products add directly; missing required enters pending area
behaviors.quickModeButton: same restrained card-toggle pattern as pending button with clear open and closed states
behaviors.quickDrinkLimit: equals current unfilled combo drink slots
behaviors.quickDrinkPopover: anchored immediately above selected drink; width equals two thirds of current product card

quickDrinkModes.custom: 48px icon plus text, horizontal scroll, configurable order

behaviors.pendingOrders: MoreFun App and phone/WhatsApp groups expand independently and scroll independently
behaviors.draft: non-empty cart saves and clears; empty cart opens stored drafts
behaviors.overlayDismiss: blank backdrop closes; dirty state requires confirmation; backdrop blocks product clicks
behaviors.editCard: cart row opens a cloned edit draft and only save applies changes
